title: The Oven Room
lines: Suddenly, the ceiling glows bright orange. Massive industrial heat coils power on.
The barn is basically a giant oven, and the temperature is rising rapidly!
In the center of the room sits a massive block of ice. There is also a keypad near the door.
You also notice some debris scattered in the corner of the room.

options.desc: Search the debris in the corner
Examine the huge block of ice
